name: Pluak Daeng town service band
notes: Town-center retail, worker services, hospitals, and district errands support destination and mixed-use charging around central Pluak Daeng.

name: Amata City Rayong industrial corridor
notes: Industrial employment corridor with supplier trips, shift-change flows, and estate-service vehicles. Suitable for fast charging and fleet-support siting.

name: WHA Eastern Seaboard industrial corridor
notes: WHA and adjacent eastern seaboard estates form a broad peri-urban industrial demand basin connected to Highway 331.

name: Pluak Daeng - Highway 331 growth axis
notes: Connector band linking the town core, hospitals, estate roads, and 331 corridor where corridor-plus-worker demand overlaps.
